title: Roast German Malai Pastry
description: A delicious and easy-to-make yeasty, chewy pastry filled with a delicious roast malai filling. This recipe is perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine warm milk and yeast. Let it sit for 5 minutes until yeast is activated.
Add flour, salt, and melted butter to the bowl. Mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until it has doubled in size.
Punch down the dough and roll it out into a thin circle. Place the roasted malai filling in the center of the dough.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges to seal the pastry.
Place the pastry on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
Let the pastry cool for 10 minutes before dusting with powdered sugar.
